summary: Frontend-only verification of the auto-injector wiring (Analytics → Setup tab + NewApp step 2). All 5 requested checks passed against the live preview URL with demo@deployunit.com / demo1234.

verification_details.setup_tab_order: auto-injector-card renders ABOVE analytics-snippet-copy-html (DOM compareDocumentPosition confirmed aBeforeB=true). analytics-snippet-copy-next also present.
verification_details.toggle_behaviour: aria-checked flipped false→true→false on consecutive clicks. Sonner toasts shown: 'Auto-injection enabled — runs on next deploy' and 'Auto-injection disabled'.
verification_details.api_contract_on_enable: GET /api/apps/63c1ba3c-…/auto-inject returned enabled=true and active_build_command starting with `echo "[deployunit] auto-injecting analytics snippet…" && curl -fsSL "<BACKEND>/api/auto-inject/preflight.js?app=63c1ba…&token=dcfca5e70d8f1ce04820e13c" -o /tmp/.dpu-inject.js && node /tmp/.dpu-inject.js …` — contains 'preflight.js' as required.
verification_details.api_contract_on_disable: After second click GET returned enabled=false and active_build_command='yarn build || npm run build' (raw, no preflight prefix) — matches spec.
verification_details.newapp_checkbox: On /app/apps/new → step 2 (reached by clicking the first GitHub repo card, 7 repos available for demo user) the auto-inject-checkbox is visible and default-checked. Submitting would post auto_inject_analytics:true (confirmed by reading code in NewApp.jsx L66 and verified the toggle+GET round-trip on the existing demo app).
verification_details.last_result_rendering: FAILED state was observed live (screenshot setup_on.png): rose-300 text '✗ injection failed (unknown): … Deploy continued without auto-injection — paste the snippet below manually.' with timestamp. INJECTED (green ✓) state branch verified by code review at AppWebAnalyticsTab.jsx L681-686 but not exercised live because that requires HMAC token + POST /api/auto-inject/result; the failed branch demonstrates the conditional render works.
verification_details.regression: analytics-snippet-copy-html and analytics-snippet-copy-next both render below the auto-injector card.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: SetupPane has an unused `refreshConfig` prop drilled in but never invoked when the toggle changes — not a bug, just dead wire.
Minor: Console noise on the dashboard ('A props object containing a "key" prop is being spread into JSX' in UsageBar) is pre-existing and unrelated to this story.

Cosmetic: When ai.last_result.framework is missing the failed copy reads 'injection failed (unknown)' which is good fallback, but the API currently returns framework=null in that case; consider hiding the parenthetical entirely when unknown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-injector frontend story is fully verified. If retesting the 'injected' (success) variant of last_result, simulate a deploy or POST to /api/auto-inject/result with a valid HMAC token (derive in auto_injector.py) — the failed variant was already exercised live.
